goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 12:30' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should go to 'kings lynn'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 12:30 and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on saturday and should go to kings lynn
Make sure you get travel time and price
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 4
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse
Make sure you get phone number
